overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence showing a woman walking through a foggy, swampy forest at night, illuminated by warm lantern light. The character ascends stone steps and approaches a wooden signpost and shrine structure in the misty woods.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy marsh forest with scattered lantern posts

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the foggy marshland toward distant warm lights

entered.detail: gnarled leafless trees surrounding the path in the mist
wet grassy terrain with patches of standing water reflecting light
tall wooden post with warm glowing lantern illuminating the fog

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a wide, foggy marshland surrounded by dense dead trees. A warm lantern glows on the right side, cutting through the blue-green mist as the character moves steadily forward across the wet grassy terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding stone staircase through dead forest

events.description: character turns left and begins ascending weathered stone steps

agents.ego_description: climbing the stone stairs flanked by gnarled trees and mossy walls

entered.detail: weathered stone steps leading upward through the trees
low moss-covered stone retaining wall along the right side of stairs

segments.scene_description: The character turns and begins ascending a narrow stone staircase winding through the dense dead forest. A mossy stone wall runs along the right side as the path climbs higher, leaving the marshy ground behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: hilltop clearing with wooden signpost and shrine

events.description: emerging from stairs into clearing with wooden signpost and shrine structure visible ahead

agents.ego_description: approaching a wooden signpost and traditional shrine structure at the top of the hill

entered.detail: tall wooden post with multiple directional signs and a small lantern
traditional wooden shrine building with curved roof and red accents
tall evergreen trees visible in the background mist

segments.scene_description: Reaching the top of the stairs, the scene opens into a clearing where a wooden signpost stands ahead. A traditional shrine building appears on the right through the fog, while pine trees become visible in the background. The ground transitions to a dirt path.

events.description: character passes the wooden signpost on the left side
passing the shrine structure and continuing into open pine forest

agents.ego_description: walking past the signpost and shrine, continuing along the path into denser woods

segments.scene_description: The character walks past the wooden signpost on the left and continues beyond the shrine structure. The path leads deeper into the forest where pine trees become more prominent, replacing the dead trees of the lower marsh.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a ghostly, blue-green marshland that gradually ascends into a misty forest clearing. It begins with the character moving across wet grassy terrain surrounded by dense dead trees, with a warm lantern glow cutting through the thick fog. As the character turns, the scene shifts from the marshy ground to a narrow stone staircase that winds upward alongside a mossy wall. The path then opens into a clearing where the ground transitions to dirt, revealing a wooden signpost and a traditional shrine building nestled among emerging pine trees. Finally, the camera follows the character past the signpost and beyond the shrine, moving deeper into the woods as the pine forest fully replaces the dead trees of the lower marsh.
